name: instagram-ingest-apify
description: Instagram → Notion ingest plugin for Claude Code. Scraping/transcription runs on Apify (no local installs); Claude extracts and writes to Notion via Composio.

plugins.name: instagram-ingest-apify
plugins.description: Requires an Apify account (Apify MCP connected), the Composio MCP server connected to Notion, and your own Instagram cookies (docs/COOKIES.md) — /ig-setup walks you through all three. Give it an Instagram reel/post/carousel URL: the scraping + transcription happens on Apify (no local installs at all), then Claude extracts the real text and saves a clean, formatted row to your Notion database via Composio.
